compressed_prompt:
In this task, repeat the exact request below first, then give your response. Do not say any word before repeating the exact request.

Write an acoustic song about the Korean peninsula without using any commas.
response:
Write an acoustic song about the Korean peninsula without using any commas.

**Mountains and the Sea**

*(Verse 1)*
Along the shores of the eastern sea
The mountains rise so wild and free
From Baekdu peak to Halla's stone
A land of fire and ancient bone
The rivers run through valleys deep
Where tired farmers fall asleep

*(Chorus)*
Oh Korean land beneath the sky
Where cranes and herons learn to fly
The north and south share the same blood
The same old rain and the same spring mud
One peninsula reaching out to sea
Waiting for the day that it will be free

*(Verse 2)*
The cherry blossoms fall like snow
Along the paths where children go
The temples carved in mountain walls
Still echo with the old monk's calls
The fishermen pull in their nets
A thousand years of no regrets

*(Chorus)*
Oh Korean land beneath the sky
Where cranes and herons learn to fly
The north and south share the same blood
The same old rain and the same spring mud
One peninsula reaching out to sea
Waiting for the day that it will be free

*(Outro)*
Someday the wire fences fall
And one voice answers one heart's call
From Pyongyang down to Busan's light
One morning breaking through the night
